channel.title: Geek News Central
channel.description: Geek News Central (Video) — Geek News Central

item.title: Remembering Todd Cochrane – Podcast Hall of Famer and Blubrry CEO and, GNC Host
item.description: On this special final New Media Show tribute episode, we honor the life and legacy of Todd Cochrane, podcasting pioneer, podcast hall of famer,…

item.title: YouTube’s Premium Family Plan Faces New Restrictions #1842
item.description: YouTube is enforcing stricter rules for its Premium Family plan, requiring all members to live in the same household. Non-eligible users will lose…

item.title: YouTube’s New Ad Tactics Designed to Extract More Money from Viewers #1821
item.description: YouTube is integrating Google’s Gemini AI to place ads at the most engaging video moments, making them harder to avoid. This AI-driven tactic…

item.title: NASA Issues Dire Warning: Budget Cuts Could Trigger Emergency ISS Deorbit #1816

item.title: Google Faces Potential Breakup as DOJ Seeks Antitrust Remedies Over Search Monopoly #1815
item.description: Alphabet is back in court as the DOJ pushes to break up Google’s search empire, proposing divestiture of Chrome and restrictions on Android and AI…

item.title: Impact of Tariffs on Tech Companies’ Stock Performance #1812
item.description: Tech stocks swung wildly as Trump reaffirmed global tariff plans, rattling markets after last week’s $1.8 trillion sell-off. Major players like…

item.title: TSMC and Intel’s Partnership #1811
item.description: TSMC and Intel have reached a preliminary deal where TSMC will help operate Intel’s chip facilities and own a 20% stake in a new joint venture. The…

item.title: Extraordinary Signal Chat Breach Tops Trump Officials #1809
item.description: In an extraordinary breach, a journalist was mistakenly included in a Signal group chat where top Trump officials coordinated upcoming military…

item.title: US Astronauts Return Home After Nine-Month Stranded Stay on ISS #1807

item.title: The AGI Standoff Is Already Happening #1804
